function.name: view_screen
function.description: Get a Screenshot of the current screen.

function.name: check_coordinates
function.description: Check where a coordinates point to on screenshot.

place.description: The expected button/element name where the coordinates should point.

function.name: left_click
function.description: Left Click on anywhere on screen by its coordinates.

coordinates.description: Array of coordiantes to left click at in [x,y] format

wait.description: Time (in sec) to wait after clicking to get the screenshot. Default = 3 seconds

reason.description: The reason and function for clicking the button.

function.name: right_click
function.description: Right Click on anywhere on screen by its coordinates.

coordinates.description: Array of coordiantes to right click at in [x,y] format

wait.description: Time (in sec) to wait after right clicking to get the screenshot. Default = 3 seconds

reason.description: The reason and function for clicking the button.

text.description: The text to type in the textbox.

press_enter.description: Wheather to press enter key after typing the text. Default = False.

wait.description: The time to wait after typing text. Default = 2 seconds

reason.description: The reason for typing the text.

function.name: press_keyboard_buttons
function.description: Press a single or multiple keybord buttons at the same time. Use to execute keyboard shortcuts or press special buttons.

shortcut.description:
The buttons to press. List of supported buttons are: 
['!', '"', '#', '$', '%', '&', "'", '(', ')', '*', '+', ',', '-', '.', '/', '0', '1',..., '9', ':', ';', '<', '=', '>', '?', '@', '[', '\', ']', '^', '_', '`', 'a', 'b', 'c',..., 'z', '{', '|', '}', '~', 'accept', 'add', 'alt', 'backspace', 'browserback', 'browserforward', 'browserhome', 'browserrefresh', 'browsersearch', 'capslock', 'clear', 'ctrl', 'del', 'down', 'end', 'enter', 'esc', 'execute', 'f1',..., 'f20', 'fn', 'home', 'insert', 'left', 'num0', 'num1',..., 'num9', 'numlock', 'pagedown', 'pageup', 'pause', 'pgdn', 'pgup', 'prntscrn', 'return', 'right', 'scrolllock', 'select', 'shift', 'sleep', 'space', 'stop', 'tab', 'up', 'win']. example- ['ctrl', 'a']

app_name.description: The name of the app to execute shortcut in. Case insensitive, partial match. Pass 'None' for shorcuts that are not executed in any specific app. eg- Chrome

wait.description: Time (in sec) to wait after pressing keyboard shorcut to get the screenshot. Default = 3 seconds

reason.description: The reason/function for executing the shortcut.

function.name: scroll
function.description: Scroll up or down at any coordinate by lines.

direction_down.description: The direction to scroll, True mean down and False means up. Default is True i.e down direction.

amount.description: The amount to scroll. Default is 6

wait.description: Time (in sec) to wait after scrolling to get the screenshot. Default = 3 seconds

function.name: add_memory
function.description: Add text to system memory. Use this to save only what user says

content.description: The text to add to system memory.

function.name: remove_memory
function.description: Remove text from system memory by occurances. Only use when user says to forget

content.description: The text to remove from memory. Case sensitive, must be exact match.

count.description: The number of occurances to remove from memory of the exact matches from start to end. Leave empty to remove all.

function.name: wait
function.description: Wait for loading screens or downloads or for repetitive task.
